_instructions: 1. Export your model as .glb (Blender: File → Export → glTF Binary)
2. Name it clearly (e.g. firstname-projectname.glb, lowercase, hyphens only)
3. Place the .glb file in the models/ folder
4. Add one entry to the 'entries' array below — the gallery auto-positions it
5. Commit and push — Cloudflare Pages deploys in ~2 minutes

entries.name: Ergonomic Pencil Holder
entries.description: A user-centred pencil holder designed for left-handed users, featuring a weighted base and angled slots for easy retrieval.

entries.name: Modular Desk Organiser
entries.description: Stackable interlocking compartments that can be reconfigured for different workspace layouts.

entries.name: Reusable Snack Container
entries.description: A zero-waste snack container with a silicone seal, designed to fit in a school backpack.
